calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Continued To Oct-15-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:15am and concluding at 9:26am.

Plaintiff Kind OP Corp appearing represented by Guy Chezrony, Esq.
Defendant Hello San Francisco, LLC not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for interest.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court reviews Memorandum of Costs.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff David Bon and she confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Kind OP Corp., and against Defendant Hello San Francisco, LLC, as follows:

Damages: $185,485.52
Prejudgment Interest: $54,479.04
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $686.85
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $240,651.41

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-30-2025 Continued To Aug-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Matter not reported.

Plaintiff Kind OP Corp appearing represented by Guy Chezrony, Esq., via Zoom.
Defendant Hello San Francisco, LLC not appearing.

Mr Chezrony appeared and asked for a continuance to amend the pleadings being submitted on this matter.

The court continues this matter to August 27, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505 for Judgment Default Prove-Up.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Continued To Sep-10-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Continued To Jul-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: Dept: 505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Jones; Reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:06:25 a.m., and concluding at 10:15:45 a.m.(D505)

This matter came on calendar this day for request of default judgment against Defendant Hello San Francisco, LLC DBA SF Roots.

Appearances:
Stephen L. Solender, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference representing Plaintiff Kind OP Corp.
Diego Celaya Bernal, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

Counsel provides a summary of the case and offers proof as to the request for judgment.

The Court examines the witness.
The Court needs more in dept testimony re the settlement agreement that Plaintiff and Defendant agreed to.

The Court continues the matter for additional witness testimony. The request for default judgment is re-set to July 30, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505.
